title: Beille 17oz Stoneware Terracotta Coffee Mug Farmhouse Decor Kitchen (4 Colors)
description:
Bring a touch of natural warmth, organic design and farmhouse decor to any kitchen, with our 17oz stoneware mugs, featuring a terracotta base and smooth, glazed upper. Thoughtfully designed to blend earthy texture with modern simplicity, these coffee mug perfectly balance function and form. Each mug is made from durable stoneware, giving it a solid, comfortable weight in hand while maintaining a refined silhouette that complements any kitchen aesthetic. The un-glazed terracotta base adds a natural contrast and tactile finish, grounding the piece in organic style. The smooth, glazed upper not only provides a sleek look but also ensures that each sip—from hot coffee and herbal tea to cocoa or Matcha—is perfectly enjoyed without lingering stains or residue.

Beille 17oz Stoneware Terracotta Coffee Mug Farmhouse Decor Kitchen (4 Colors)

Bring a touch of natural warmth, organic design and farmhouse decor to any kitchen, with our 17oz stoneware mugs, featuring a terracotta base and smooth, glazed upper. Thoughtfully designed to blend earthy texture with modern simplicity, these coffee mug perfectly balance function and form.

Each mug is made from durable stoneware, giving it a solid, comfortable weight in hand while maintaining a refined silhouette that complements any kitchen aesthetic. The un-glazed terracotta base adds a natural contrast and tactile finish, grounding the piece in organic style. The smooth, glazed upper not only provides a sleek look but also ensures that each sip—from hot coffee and herbal tea to cocoa or Matcha—is perfectly enjoyed without lingering stains or residue.

Key Features

  • COFFEE MUGS: Crafted with a glossy stoneware upper and matte terracotta base, each mug combines warmth and simplicity; the blend of materials creates a balanced, tactile drinking experience, one that feels both modern and handcrafted, perfect for any kitchen
  • 17OZ CAPACITY: Designed for slow mornings and cozy afternoons, the 17 ounce size offers an ideal pour for coffee, tea, matcha, cocoa, lattes and more, comfortably holding your favorite drink without feeling too oversized
  • 4 SOFT & NEUTRAL COLORS: Available in four naturally inspired hues, each mug complements a range of kitchen palettes—from warm neutrals to cool minimal tones—inviting easy mixing and matching
  • DISHWASHER & MICROWAVE SAFE: Durable stoneware construction ensures lasting quality, while microwave and dishwasher safe materials make daily use easy and effortless from start to finish
  • THOUGHTFUL GIFTING: Beautifully designed for everyday living, these mugs make a thoughtful gift for coffee and tea lovers, hosts or hostesses, housewarmings, birthdays and more

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BLE-TCMUGS-PARENT

Designed for everyday convenience, these mugs are microwave and dishwasher safe, making them as practical as they are beautiful. Their 17 ounce capacity offers the perfect size for generous pours of your favorite hot or cold beverages, whether you’re brewing your first cup in the morning or winding down with tea in the evening. Available in four modern colorways, each mug brings a curated, collected feel to your table or open shelving, inviting you to mix and match for a warm, lived in look.

Perfect for home use, at the office, cabin or cottage, or as a thoughtful gift for coffee and tea lovers alike, Beille's terracotta based stoneware mugs are a must have staple that elevates daily rituals, one sip at a time.

PLEASE NOTE: Only (1) mug is included per order unless you order multiple quantities. Select your prefered color for (1) mug via the drop down menu.
